prompt: We publish 12 npm packages from our Nx monorepo. Some are independent libs, some are tightly coupled (our component library + its theme package + its icon set). How should we version and publish these?
assertions: Recommends a specific versioning tool (Changesets, Lerna, or semantic-release)
Explains grouped/fixed versioning for coupled packages vs independent for others
Provides Changesets config or equivalent showing package grouping
